calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-08-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2023 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MOHAMED AWAD'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's "motion for leave to file first amended complaint" is granted. "That trial courts are to liberally permit such amendments, at any stage of the proceeding, has been established policy in this state since 1901." (Hirsa v. Sup. Ct. (1981) 118 Cal.App.3d 486, 488-89; see also CCP 428.50(c).) A proposed amended complaint's validity is not considered when deciding leave to amend. (See Kittredge Sports Co. v. Sup. Ct. (1989) 213 Cal.App.3d 1045, 1048.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
